title: Panic Alert Broadcast
subtitle: Citywide panic alerts must reach channels in seconds
objective: Build a low-latency alert architecture with buffered delivery guarantees.

concepts.title: Fast Intake
concepts.description: Ingress should include client -> load balancer -> API.

concepts.title: Delivery Buffering
concepts.description: Queue and worker fan-out alerts asynchronously.

concepts.title: Alert State Persistence
concepts.description: Track final dispatch status in database.
